prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: refined dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 5, title Ash Priest
Scene/background: ritual nave filled with ash haze and dim braziers, clearer separation between character and background, atmospheric but readable
Subject: central ash priest with stronger silhouette, hooded, darker ceremonial armor, violet ember core in the chest and ashen ritual smoke spiraling around the body
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy mobile game illustration, polished and readable on phone screens, progression-consistent
Composition/framing: centered full figure, square composition, clear focal point on the torso and hands, reduced mud and shadow loss
Lighting/mood: grim devotion, smoky ritual power, controlled menace
Color palette: charcoal, black steel, muted ember orange, rich violet highlights
Materials/textures: ash cloth, scarred armor, smoke, embers, rune heat
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only, preserve dark mood but improve clarity and separation
